results.prompt_sent:
Determine if the following 3-SAT formula is satisfiable.

Variables: x1, x2, x3, x4
Formula: (x2 v x1 v x4) ^ (x4 v x2 v ~x1) ^ (~x4 v x2 v ~x1) ^ (~x4 v x3 v x1) ^ (~x1 v x2 v ~x3) ^ (~x4 v ~x1 v ~x3) ^ (x2 v ~x1 v x3) ^ (~x2 v ~x3 v x4) ^ (~x2 v ~x4 v x1) ^ (x2 v ~x1 v ~x4) ^ (~x3 v ~x4 v ~x2) ^ (x4 v x3 v ~x2) ^ (x2 v x1 v x4) ^ (x2 v x4 v x3) ^ (~x4 v x3 v ~x1) ^ (x4 v ~x1 v x3) ^ (x3 v x2 v x4)

Where 'v' means OR, '^' means AND, and '~' means NOT.
Is this formula satisfiable? Answer with just 'Yes' or 'No'.

Where 'v' means OR, '^' means AND, and '~' means NOT.
Is this formula satisfiable? Answer with just 'Yes' or 'No'.
